heading: Investigation of accident or injury giving rise to claim
label: 3777 Investigation of accident or injury giving rise to claim
notes: Amendments1996—Par. (1). amended par. (1) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (1) read as follows: “an investigation by the competent authorities of the accident or injury giving rise to the claim has been completed; and”.Pub. L. 104–201
amendments: Amendments1996—Par. (1). amended par. (1) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (1) read as follows: “an investigation by the competent authorities of the accident or injury giving rise to the claim has been completed; and”.Pub. L. 104–201

children.text: an investigation of the accident or injury giving rise to the claim has been completed, which shall include a hearing by the Board of Local Inspectors of the Commission; and
the basis for the claim has been laid before the Commission.
